content.full_text:
Fair Political Practices Commission  
P.O. Box 807,  
Sacramento, Ca., 95804-0807

February 21, 1991

Ladies/Gentlemen:

I am writing in regards to surplus funds which were left over in my candidacy account, Haddad For Council Committee, #902309. I have transferred these funds to another committee controlled by me, Montereyans For Open Government, which was formed for the purpose of qualifying an initiative for the ballot and to support the initiative once it has qualified.

The transfer of funds from committee #902309 was affected in the later part of December, 1990 to MFOG, #901764. We intend to pay for advertisements to support the initiative which is scheduled for the March 5 election.

This memorandum is specifically to confirm the legality of the above transaction.

Thank you for your kind attention.

Sincerely,

Lou Haddad  
5 Deer Stalker Path,  
Monterey, Ca., 93940  
(408) 373-5222
